emails.subject: PG&E Canadian Gas Master
emails.body: PG&E Canadian Gas Master Peter Larry Witalis at PG&E wants to set up a meeting on Tues the 8th to go over the Canadian gas master would you or somebody else be available some time tomorrow? Thanks Elizabeth 713 853 6349

emails.subject: PG&E Canadian Gas Master
emails.body: PG&E Canadian Gas Master Peter Larry Witalis at PG&E wants to set up a meeting on Tues the 8th to go over the Canadian gas master would you or somebody else be available some time tomorrow? Thanks Elizabeth 713 853 6349

emails.subject: Re: PG&E Canadian Gas Master
emails.body: Re: PG&E Canadian Gas Master Any time tomorrow other than 4pm Central, 3pm Mountain, 2pm Pacific would be fine. Mark prepared the comments. so he will be involved as well. Mark in advance of the meeting please review our comments. From: Elizabeth Sager on 05/07/2001 02:30 PM CDT
